name: Shopify
description: Monitor Shopify e-commerce platform for store security, staff access, and payment compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Shopify Admin at https://yourstore.myshopify.com/admin
2. Go to Settings → Apps → Develop apps
3. Create a custom app and enable required Admin API scopes
4. Install the app to reveal the access token
5. Enter your store URL and access token below

credentialFields.label: Admin API Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create a Custom App in Shopify Admin → Settings → Apps → Develop Apps, then install it to get the token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Shopify staff accounts and their store access permissions
